title: GSD Vendored at v1.26.0 — 101 Commits Behind Upstream
description: GSD lifecycle engine is vendored at v1.26.0. Dual-copy structure gsd/bin/ vs gsd/get-shit-done/bin/ with all 12 lib files differing. 8 upstream commands missing from commands/gsd/.

title: Duplicate GSD Binary Tree: gsd/bin/ vs gsd/get-shit-done/bin/
description: Two full copies of gsd-tools.cjs and all lib/*.cjs files. gsd/get-shit-done/ is the upstream snapshot, gsd/bin/ is KP-modified fork. No runtime purpose for the duplicate.

title: 8 Upstream GSD Commands Missing from KP commands/gsd/
description: add-backlog, audit-uat, fast, plant-seed, pr-branch, review-backlog, review, thread present in gsd/commands/gsd/ but absent from root commands/gsd/.

title: 16 GSD Agent Types — Consolidation Opportunity
description: 22 total agents with clustering in UI domain (3 agents) and research domain (3 agents) doing narrow, context-specific variants of the same role. Consolidation to ~8 parameterized agents would reduce surface.

title: 17 of 22 Agents Lack Parameterization
description: Only 5 agents have caller-controllable parameters (gsd-codebase-mapper, gsd-executor, multi-perspective-review, quality-gate, strategic-planner). 17 have fixed behavior despite v6.1.0 making parameterization a design goal.

title: Beads Integration Absent from GSD Workflows
description: skills/beads/SKILL.md documents bd protocol but zero GSD commands/workflows reference beads. Multi-session GSD work has no bead-based context recovery path.

title: Scanner.py Cannot Distinguish Protocol Language from Compulsion Language
description: 540 findings when scanning full repo, 535 medium. GSD workflow specification language triggers the same patterns as skill compulsion language. 4 HIGH findings in vendored gsd/workflows/ files cause CI failure.

title: Self-Optimizing Pipeline: Design Complete but Not Implemented
description: SELF_OPTIMIZING_PIPELINE.md documents 4-phase feedback loop (scavenger→PRIM→CMA-ES→profile update). Profiles are hard-coded in src/profiles.rs. SEQUENTIAL_THINKING_PROFILES_PATH env var has no implementation. Session logs accumulate but are never fed back.

title: GSD Workflow Files Fail Scanner CI Check
description: scanner.py --check --dir gsd/ exits 1 due to 4 HIGH findings in gsd/workflows/plan-phase.md and gsd/workflows/execute-plan.md. These are protocol language not compulsion language.

title: gsd/docs/AGENTS.md Says 15 Agents, Directory Has 16
description: gsd-user-profiler was added in v1.26.0. Header and category table count 15. gsd/agents/ contains 16 files. The 6 KP-native agents are not documented anywhere.

title: research-extractor Agent Uses WebFetch with No URL Allowlist
description: agents/research-extractor.md declares WebFetch tool with model=opus and broad tool access. No URL allowlist or content validation specified.

title: Rust Tests Mutate Env Vars Without Full Cleanup
description: server.rs tests use std::env::set_var without cleanup in some locations. DISABLE_THOUGHT_LOGGING set at line 399 is never removed. Parallel test runs can see stale env vars.

title: PersistentLogger Writes to Disk on Every Thought
description: logging.rs opens and appends to JSONL file on each persist() call. No batching. Acceptable for < 50 thoughts but degrades for long explore sessions generating 200+ thoughts.

title: KP Agents vs GSD Agents: Two Layers with No Clear Precedence
description: 11 of 16 shared agents differ between agents/ (KP-modified) and gsd/agents/ (upstream). Modifying gsd/agents/ has no effect at runtime. No documentation clarifies which layer is authoritative.

title: Scanner MUST/NEVER Regex Does Not Handle Multi-Line Escape Clauses
description: scanner.py operates line-by-line. MUST pattern uses negative lookahead that only covers the current line. Escape clause on next line does not prevent a false positive finding.

title: 6 KP-Native Agents Have No Automated Tests
description: multi-perspective-review, quality-gate, strategic-planner, team-coordinator, research-extractor, code-reviewer have no test coverage in tests/. Parameter parsing and mode routing are untested.

title: etc/sequential_thinking_profiles.json Does Not Exist
description: SELF_OPTIMIZING_PIPELINE.md specifies profiles loaded from etc/sequential_thinking_profiles.json. File does not exist. All profiles are compiled into src/profiles.rs. External tuning requires Rust rebuild.
